objective: Synthesize technical and fundamental evidence into object-level research views with confidence caps and invalidation rules.
forbidden: Do not convert research views into order instructions.
Do not emit directional final views when technical and fundamental inputs hard-conflict.
Do not treat latest synthesized rows as historical backtest features.
acceptance_criteria: Decision trace explains evidence and confidence caps.
Hard conflicts are capped into neutral final views.
Research-only, no-order, no-portfolio, and no-backtest boundaries are explicit.
failure_conditions: Hard conflict emitted as bullish or bearish.
Synthesized row allowed as an order, portfolio weight, or historical backtest feature.
